name: It's Buizel, Not Weasel
description:
... to be honest I don't know about pokemon much, I played pokemon X before, but that was it. BUT to be honest, I like pokemon like y'all do so let's uhhh. grab out phones and pirate pokemon games, yay! 


I don't know pokemon that well so she might not be accurate to the games, please don't get mad at me.

so heres the drill, I get more followers, you get more bot waves, Kapiche? YAY I THINK YOU SAID YES, enjoy the bot!
